parameters.query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM raw_news WHERE status = 'pending') as pending_news,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM raw_news WHERE status = 'processing') as processing_news,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM generated_content WHERE status = 'draft') as draft_content,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM generated_content WHERE status = 'approved') as approved_content,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM generated_content WHERE status = 'rejected') as rejected_content,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM generated_content WHERE status = 'review') as review_content,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM publications WHERE status = 'failed') as failed_publications,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM publications WHERE status = 'success') as successful_publications,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM corporate_memory WHERE applied = FALSE) as unapplied_learning,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_logs WHERE log_level = 'error' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') as recent_errors;

=INSERT INTO system_logs (workflow_name, log_level, message, details) VALUES ('07_sistem_izleme', '{{ $json.health_level === 'critical' ? 'error' : $json.health_level === 'warning' ? 'warning' : 'info' }}', '{{ $json.summary }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.metrics).replace(/'/g, "''") }}');
